학개 2:1.content: In the seventh month, in the twenty-first day of the month, Yahweh’s word came by Haggai the prophet, saying,

학개 2:2.content: “Speak now to Zerubbabel, the son of Shealtiel, governor of Judah, and to Joshua, the son of Jehozadak, the high priest, and to the remnant of the people, saying,

학개 2:3.content: ‘Who is left among you who saw this house in its former glory? How do you see it now? Isn’t it in your eyes as nothing?

학개 2:4.content: Yet now be strong, Zerubbabel,’ says Yahweh. ‘Be strong, Joshua, son of Jehozadak, the high priest. Be strong, all you people of the land,’ says Yahweh, ‘and work, for I am with you,’ says Yahweh of Armies.

학개 2:5.content: This is the word that I covenanted with you when you came out of Egypt, and my Spirit lived among you. ‘Don’t be afraid.’

학개 2:6.content: For this is what Yahweh of Armies says: ‘Yet once, it is a little while, and I will shake the heavens, the earth, the sea, and the dry land;

학개 2:7.content: and I will shake all nations. The precious things of all nations will come, and I will fill this house with glory, says Yahweh of Armies.

학개 2:8.content: The silver is mine, and the gold is mine,’ says Yahweh of Armies.

학개 2:9.content: ‘The latter glory of this house will be greater than the former,’ says Yahweh of Armies; ‘and in this place I will give peace,’ says Yahweh of Armies.”

학개 2:10.content: In the twenty-fourth day of the ninth month, in the second year of Darius, Yahweh’s word came by Haggai the prophet, saying,

학개 2:11.content: “Yahweh of Armies says: Ask now the priests concerning the law, saying,

학개 2:12.content: ‘If someone carries holy meat in the fold of his garment, and with his fold touches bread, stew, wine, oil, or any food, will it become holy?’ ” The priests answered, “No.”

학개 2:13.content: Then Haggai said, “If one who is unclean by reason of a dead body touch any of these, will it be unclean?” The priests answered, “It will be unclean.”

학개 2:14.content: Then Haggai answered, “ ‘So is this people, and so is this nation before me,’ says Yahweh; ‘and so is every work of their hands. That which they offer there is unclean.

학개 2:15.content: Now, please consider from this day and backward, before a stone was laid on a stone in Yahweh’s temple.

학개 2:16.content: Through all that time, when one came to a heap of twenty measures, there were only ten. When one came to the wine vat to draw out fifty, there were only twenty.

학개 2:17.content: I struck you with blight, mildew, and hail in all the work of your hands; yet you didn’t turn to me,’ says Yahweh.

학개 2:18.content: ‘Consider, please, from this day and backward, from the twenty-fourth day of the ninth month, since the day that the foundation of Yahweh’s temple was laid, consider it.

학개 2:19.content: Is the seed yet in the barn? Yes, the vine, the fig tree, the pomegranate, and the olive tree haven’t produced. From today I will bless you.’ ”

학개 2:20.content: Yahweh’s word came the second time to Haggai in the twenty-fourth day of the month, saying,

학개 2:21.content: “Speak to Zerubbabel, governor of Judah, saying, ‘I will shake the heavens and the earth.

학개 2:22.content: I will overthrow the throne of kingdoms. I will destroy the strength of the kingdoms of the nations. I will overthrow the chariots, and those who ride in them. The horses and their riders will come down, everyone by the sword of his brother.

학개 2:23.content: In that day, says Yahweh of Armies, I will take you, Zerubbabel, my servant, the son of Shealtiel,’ says Yahweh, ‘and will make you as a signet, for I have chosen you,’ says Yahweh of Armies.”
